title: 合同阻断能力真实不可用边界强化报告
purpose: Guarantee that absent contracts produce only truthful unavailable states for all contract-blocked product capabilities.

centralizedProjection.description: Single typed project-owned capability-availability projection. All blocked remote families default to contract-blocked until a real contract is confirmed. Authentication is only considered after the projection returns available or auth-required.

consumers.change: Replaced local evaluateContract with centralized evaluateCapabilityAvailability. Maps /match, /share, /cloud to protected_replay, share_content, cloud_content. Contract is evaluated before any authentication state or handoff generation.
Replaced local evaluateLiveContract with evaluateLiveSpectatorAvailability. /competitions/:hdid/live always renders contract-blocked before auth.

Evaluates protected_replay contract before authentication. Removed login-before-contract prompt. Replaced user-visible 生产 terminology. Renamed internal PGN source from production_api to remote_replay.

handoffSecurity.change: Removed qrcode and serialNumber from WorkspaceHandoffContext, ALLOWED_KEYS, validation, creation, and workspaceModeContextFromHandoff mapping. These hardware/live device identifiers may only return after a real contract confirms they are non-secret selection fields.

typeCleanup.change: Removed qrcode/serialNumber from WorkspaceModeContext and defaults. Renamed DataSource type production_api to remote_replay.

validatedRoutes.notes: Contract evaluated before auth; no request; no handoff generation; safe return to /competitions.
Same as /match; source mapped to share_content.
Same as /match; source mapped to cloud_content.
Live board position contract not confirmed; no request; no MQTT/WebSocket/SSE installed.
WorkspaceModeController renders ProductUnavailableState for missing or corrupted handoff.
NotFoundView renders ProductUnavailableState with safe return; no redirect to /.
blockedActionText hides replay/live actions behind textual unavailable notices before navigation.
Shows public pairing composition; live board/clock area shows '实时棋盘暂不可用' and does not issue live requests.

routeValidation.result: All contract-blocked routes render truthful unavailable surfaces. No route renders a second board, PGN, annotation, analysis, or workspace shell.

checks.evidence: No blocked credentials, secrets, or sensitive identifiers in route params or query strings. Compatibility route identifiers are sanitized. Handoff ID is a random opaque value.
No auth tokens, passwords, MQTT credentials, or blocked DTOs placed in router state. safeAuthReturnPath rejects sensitive query keys.
No new localStorage keys. Auth record remains kaisaile.auth.v1 only. qrcode/serialNumber removed from handoff persistence.
WorkspaceHandoffContext only persists approved non-sensitive selection fields (mode, source, ids, labels, returnRoute). Hardware identifiers removed.
Vue Query state is in-memory only. No persisted cache of responses, connections, snapshots, or credentials.
Blocked remote sources never load PGN. UNAVAILABLE_SOURCES gates editing, analysis, evaluation, and write-back. Live spectator mode is readonly and AI-free.
Removed '生产回放' and '生产' terminology from user-facing strings. Error messages sanitize sensitive patterns.
replayRepository.finishedGame rejects without emitting a request. Compatibility and live routes do not call unconfirmed endpoints. No MQTT/WebSocket/SSE/replay/clock/hardware packages installed.

permissionAndAuth.notes: 401 triggers notifyPrivateAuthLoss on protected requests; 403 maps to permission-denied and preserves session. Compatibility/live routes evaluate contract before checking auth.

teamAggregates.notes: Competition detail shows personal pairing list only. No team totals, rankings, or synthetic aggregates derived from personal pairings. Team aggregates remain contract-blocked.

browserAcceptance.notes: Narrow browser inspection performed during prior page-family implementation for /match, /share, /cloud, /competitions/:hdid/live, /competitions/:hdid, /competitions/:hdid/display, and invalid handoff. All render ProductUnavailableState or blocked notices with no Vite error overlay and no unapproved network requests.

openDecisions.OD_01_to_OD_11: Remain open. No page slice silently closes them. Contract-blocked capabilities continue to render truthful unavailable states pending owner decisions and real contracts.

remainingRisk: None identified. All listed contract-blocked families lack confirmed contracts and render truthful unavailable states. Future contract additions must update capabilityAvailability.ts and establish typed repository/source adapters before any success UI is shown.
